rationale: Ukraine actively targeting Russian energy infrastructure is a continuation of war strategy; Iran deal delay slightly reduces US distraction risk but no qualitative shift in Western support.

top_events.title: Ukraine to keep targeting Russian energy after hitting sea terminal
top_events.summary: Ukraine confirms continued offensive strikes on Russian energy infrastructure, including a sea terminal. This is an active Ukrainian military strategy with direct relevance to war dynamics.

top_events.title: Trump says US-Iran deal to be signed Sunday; Tehran casts doubt
top_events.summary: Delayed Iran deal means US diplomatic attention remains split; slight relief for Ukraine that Washington is not fully pivoting away, but uncertainty continues.

top_events.title: Canada-EU unity call before G7 summit
top_events.summary: Canada and EU signaling solidarity ahead of G7 may reinforce Western coalition support for Ukraine, though no concrete new commitments announced.
